summary: A Go-based CLI tool for running infrastructure assertions, migrating from Goss, with planned OpenTelemetry trace correlation.
concerns: Heavy documentation focus in recent commits may indicate stalled implementation
Uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged) suggest incomplete work
Goss migration implies legacy dependency that may need long-term maintenance
suggestions: Complete and commit the current in-progress changes
Transition from design docs to implementing the OpenTelemetry trace correlation
Expand test coverage beyond the core runner and translator modules
Document the plugin system to encourage community extensions
